referrals.name: Anna Kowalska
referrals.relationship: Worked together on Dynatrace app initiatives
referrals.quote: Veranika brings a rare mix of design sensitivity and engineering discipline. She consistently translated vague product ideas into clear, testable UI flows that our users loved.

referrals.name: Michael Lee
referrals.relationship: Front-end teammate on multiple client projects
referrals.quote: I could always trust Veranika with the most visible parts of our applications. She cares deeply about accessibility, performance, and clean architecture on the front end.

referrals.name: Sara Novak
referrals.relationship: Stakeholder for a marketing site redesign
referrals.quote: Our new website finally matched the story we wanted to tell. Collaborating with Veranika was smooth, fast, and she proactively suggested better solutions than what we initially requested.
